user.title: Set up Room
user.description: Configure the room for shading control.

data.event_switch_position: Target position when event switch is active (%)

cover.title: Configure Cover
cover.description: Add a cover to this room.

data_description.sun_azimuth_sensor: If set, this binary sensor (device_class: light) determines whether the sun is shining on this cover. The azimuth range below is ignored when a sensor is configured.
data_description.sun_azimuth_start: Start angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359).
data_description.sun_azimuth_end: End angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359). If start > end, the range wraps over 0 degrees (e.g. 330 to 30).

add_more.title: Add another cover?
add_more.description: You can add more covers to this room or finish the setup.

error.cover_already_added: This cover has already been added to the room.

init.title: Edit Room Configuration
init.description: Edit room properties and existing covers.

data.event_switch_position: Target position when event switch is active (%)

cover.title: Add Cover
cover.description: Add another cover to this room.

data_description.sun_azimuth_sensor: If set, this binary sensor (device_class: light) determines whether the sun is shining on this cover. The azimuth range below is ignored when a sensor is configured.
data_description.sun_azimuth_start: Start angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359).
data_description.sun_azimuth_end: End angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359). If start > end, the range wraps over 0 degrees (e.g. 330 to 30).

cover_select.title: Select Cover
cover_select.description: Choose which existing cover you want to edit.

data_description.sun_azimuth_sensor: If set, this binary sensor (device_class: light) determines whether the sun is shining on this cover. The azimuth range below is ignored when a sensor is configured.
data_description.sun_azimuth_start: Start angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359).
data_description.sun_azimuth_end: End angle of the sun azimuth window (0-359). If start > end, the range wraps over 0 degrees (e.g. 330 to 30).

error.cover_not_found: The selected cover could not be found.
